info.title: Tripwire Server SDK API
info.description: Customer-facing server-side Tripwire APIs for the public SDK surface.

tags.name: Gate
tags.description: Registry, team-owned services, signup sessions, agent tokens, and dashboard login sessions.

get.summary: List Gate services for the authenticated team
get.description: Requires Authorization: Bearer sk_* with the gate:services:read scope.

403.description: Secret key required or insufficient scope.

post.summary: Create a Gate service for the authenticated team
post.description: Requires Authorization: Bearer sk_* with the gate:services:manage scope.

403.description: Secret key required or insufficient scope.

409.description: Duplicate service_id or team Gate service limit reached.

get.summary: Get one Gate service for the authenticated team
get.description: Requires Authorization: Bearer sk_* with the gate:services:read scope.

403.description: Secret key required or insufficient scope.

patch.summary: Update a Gate service for the authenticated team
patch.description: Requires Authorization: Bearer sk_* with the gate:services:manage scope.

403.description: Secret key required or insufficient scope.

delete.summary: Disable a Gate service for the authenticated team
delete.description: Requires Authorization: Bearer sk_* with the gate:services:manage scope. This is a soft delete that sets status=disabled.

403.description: Secret key required or insufficient scope.

post.summary: Create a Gate dashboard login session

post.description: Requires Authorization: Bearer sk_* with the gate:agent_tokens:verify scope.

403.description: Secret key required or insufficient scope.

post.description: Requires Authorization: Bearer sk_* with the gate:agent_tokens:revoke scope.

403.description: Secret key required or insufficient scope.

post.summary: Consume a Gate dashboard login code
post.description: Requires Authorization: Bearer sk_* with the gate:login_sessions:consume scope.

403.description: Secret key required or insufficient scope.

410.description: Login code expired or already consumed.

webhook_secret.description: If provided, must be at least 32 characters. Omit on create to let Gate generate one.

GateServiceId.description: Canonical Gate service slug used by the public registry and by npx signup <service>. Lowercase letters, numbers, dashes, and underscores only; must start and end with a letter or number.

SessionClientTelemetry.description: Curated lower-level client telemetry grouped for investigation and analysis.

UpdateGateServiceRequest.description: Partial Gate service update. Nested objects and arrays replace the existing value wholesale.

webhook_secret.description: If provided, must be at least 32 characters. Omit on create to let Gate generate one.

BearerAuth.description: Send Authorization: Bearer <token>. Gate business endpoints require sk_* secret keys. Gate workflow endpoints use gate-native bearer tokens such as gtpoll_* or agt_* where documented.

post.description: Tripwire sends this webhook to the integrator when a signup session is approved. Verify X-Tripwire-Timestamp and X-Tripwire-Signature against the raw request body.

parameters.name: X-Tripwire-Timestamp
parameters.description: Unix timestamp used in the webhook signature base string.

429.description: Rate limited. Respect Retry-After before retrying the webhook.
